channel.title: Business Email Compromise on Asgar
channel.description: Recent content in Business Email Compromise on Asgar

item.title: Detecting Post-Phishing Inbox Rule Abuse in Microsoft 365
item.description:
Detection Context

This post documents a Sigma rule contributed to SigmaHQ targeting post-phishing inbox rule abuse in Microsoft 365 Exchange Online.

Log Source: M365 Unified Audit Log
Technique: MITRE ATT&CK T1114.003 — Email Collection: Email Forwarding Rule
Status: Experimental — pending production validation

The Technique

After a successful phishing attack, credential theft alone is rarely the end goal. Persistent access to a victim mailbox is more valuable — and inbox rules are how attackers get it.
